name: Widget Title
helpText: Header title displayed at the top of the widget.

name: Currency Symbol
helpText: Currency prefix for claimable amounts (e.g. LKR, USD, EUR).

name: Attribute Key Name (JSON)
helpText: The telemetry key that contains the JSON array of claim events.

name: Energy Unit
helpText: Unit label for energy lost values (e.g. MWh, kWh).

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the border glow accent (CSS color, e.g. #06F5FF). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the card-level tooltip. Leave empty for auto-generated summary.

name: Enable Demo Data
helpText: Show demo claims when no real data is available. Disable for production.
